title: AGF Camera components
description: Component definitions for the camera domain. Pulled in by scene.schema.json via $ref; inlined into the bundled schema by engine/tools/schemas/load-scene-schema.ts.

cinematicCameraComponent.description: M21-cam-cinematic: scripted camera waypoint playback. Each waypoint declares a camera position + look-at target + duration. CinematicCameraSystem interpolates Transform.position + rotation through the chain. `autoplay: true` starts on scene load; gameplay can pause/skip via applyCommands flipping `playing` or seeking `elapsed`.

duration.description: Seconds to traverse from the previous waypoint to this one.

elapsed.description: Time accumulated since the start of the current cycle.

followCameraComponent.description: M21-cam-follow: anchor the camera to a target entity. Each frame FollowCameraSystem reads the target's world position, places the camera at `targetPosition + offset`, and orients it toward `targetPosition + lookAtOffset`. `smoothing` blends the previous camera position toward the new target per-frame (1 = snap, 0 = frozen).

offset.description: Camera position relative to the target.

lookAtOffset.description: Optional offset added to the target before computing the look-at direction; useful for looking slightly above the head.

smoothing.description: Per-frame lerp factor toward the desired position. 1 = snap, 0 = never move.

orbitCameraComponent.description: M21-cam-orbit: pure-data orbit-camera state. Place on the same entity as `Camera` + `Transform`. OrbitCameraSystem reads `(target, distance, pitch, yaw)` each frame and writes Transform.position + rotation so the camera looks at `target` from the given polar angles. Gameplay systems (mouse drag, follow-target, etc.) mutate these fields via applyCommands; the system stays input-agnostic.

target.description: World-space point the camera looks at.

pitch.description: Down-from-horizon angle in degrees. 0 = horizontal; positive = looking down.

yaw.description: Angle around Y axis in degrees.
